text.title: kanban-scaled-agile-ceremonies Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for kanban-scaled-agile-ceremonies as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: WIP limits without leadership backing become aspirational; teams blow past them under pressure.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without visible enforcement and leadership support for pushing back on demand, WIP limits are ignored.

failure-mode.description: Service-delivery review devolves into status theater unless metrics drive concrete policy changes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: SDR without decisions becomes a data dump. Tie every metric to an action (WIP adjustment, priority re-rank, process change).

failure-mode.description: PI Planning quality drops sharply when run remote-only with poor tooling (Miro lag, audio chaos).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PI Planning depends on real-time cross-team problem-solving. Remote logistics must match in-person (clear tool, low latency, breakout rooms).

failure-mode.description: Scrum-of-Scrums turns into a status round-robin instead of a dependency-resolution forum.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: SoS without focused agenda becomes theater. Set rule: only discuss cross-team dependencies and escalations; status updates happen in team standups.

failure-mode.description: Agents trained on Scrum default to sprint-thinking; explicitly tell them "this team uses Kanban, no sprints, WIP-limited."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLM training data skews Scrum-heavy. Without explicit constraint, agents suggest sprint boundaries and velocity tracking.

failure-mode.description: Cycle-time math: define "started" precisely (entered "In Progress" vs. assignee set). LLMs guess inconsistently.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Ambiguous definition leads to inconsistent calculations. Pin the definition in the system prompt.

failure-mode.description: SAFe terminology overlap (PI vs. Iteration, Feature vs. Story) — pin definitions in the system prompt or get garbage outputs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: SAFe reuses Scrum terms with slightly different meanings. Agents hallucinate without explicit vocabulary.

failure-mode.description: An agent generating retro themes from comments often surfaces venting, not actionable signal — filter for verbs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Comments capture emotion. Themes need to be actionable improvement statements with owners and due dates.

failure-mode.description: Confidence-vote scores look like data but are social signals; do not feed raw to forecasting models.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Confidence votes reflect team optimism at PI Planning; they are not predictive of actual delivery. Use historical cycle-time data instead.

failure-mode.description: Time-zone math for distributed PI Planning: pass explicit IANA TZ strings, never "PST" / "EST".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Daylight saving time rules vary. Agents miscount hours without explicit timezone.
